cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out the answer. So today is the second day of the third month of 1966. That means today is March 2nd, 1966, right? Because the third month is March. So the date today is 03/02/1966. The question is asking what the date will be tomorrow. Well, tomorrow would be the next day after March 2nd. So that would be March 3rd, 1966. So the date tomorrow in MM/DD/YYYY would be 03/03/1966. Let me check the options. Option A is 03/03/1966. So A is the correct answer. Wait, but let me make sure there's no trick here. For example, is there a possibility that the third month is not March? No, the months go January (1st), February (2nd), March (3rd). So the third month is definitely March.
